ServiceDefinition.description: Return selection for equipment, The following priority is considered: ScreenRotationEquipments, SessionEquipments, CurrentEquipments. After the introduction of the function that several asset groups can be selected, there is the feature that if no asset of a group is selected, all assets of this group are also selected.
ServiceDefinition.name: GetAssortedEquipments

FieldDefinition.aspect.defaultValue: FieldDefinition.name: selectedLocations

ServiceDefinition.description: This service uses either the given "selectedCountry" infotable or the location entities (that are visible for the user) to return a list of companies.
ServiceDefinition.name: QueryAllCompanies

ServiceDefinition.description: This service uses either the given "selectedCountry" infotable or the location entities (that are visible for the user) to return a list of companies.
ServiceDefinition.name: QueryAllCompaniesForDropdownData

ServiceDefinition.description: Returns all country based on location entities that the user has visibility permissions for.
ServiceDefinition.name: QueryAllCountriesBasedOnLocationEntities

ServiceDefinition.description: This service uses either the given "selectedCompany" infotable or the location entities (that are visible for the user) to return a list of location names.
ServiceDefinition.name: QueryAllLocations

ServiceDefinition.description: This service uses either the given "selectedCompany" infotable or the location entities (that are visible for the user) to return a list of location names.
ServiceDefinition.name: QueryAllLocationsForDropdownData

ServiceDefinition.description: This service updates the session variables as required. Undefined values are ignored.
ServiceDefinition.name: SetFilterSessionVariables

ServiceDefinition.description: Updates filter variables to select a single asset on load
ServiceDefinition.name: SetSingleAssetView

Row.code: result = sessionMachineGroup;
